arts.ttl: Marc Guehi's dad fumes at the FA for reprimanding England star in Rainbow armband row
arts.sum: Marc Guehi's father has jumped to defend his son after he was reprimanded by the FA for writing "I love Jesus" on his rainbow captain's armband - and claimed the Crystal Palace player didn't offend anyone

arts.ttl: Marc Guehi writes message on Rainbow captain's armband AGAIN after FA reprimand
arts.sum: Marc Guehi has written on his captain's armband once again and the Crystal Palace defender risks the wrath of the FA, who prohibit the altering of the armband

arts.ttl: Gallery: The best photos as Palace take on Ipswich
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are in action against Ipswich Town in the Premier League for the first time since 1995 – follow the best photos from Portman Road below!

arts.ttl: Ipswich star Sam Morsy doubles down on Rainbow armband refusal after Premier League stance
arts.sum: Sam Morsy refused to wear a Rainbow armband in support of LGBT+ inclusion in Ipswich's defeat to Nottingham Forest on Saturday and repeated that stance for Tuesday's visit of Crystal Palace

arts.ttl: LIVE: Ipswich take on Crystal Palace, Van Nistelrooy starts Leicester era against West Ham
Ipswich v Crystal Palace team line-ups: Glasner makes one change from Newcastle draw
arts.sum: Palace: Henderson, Munoz, Lacroix, Chalobah, Guehi, Mitchell, Hughes, Doucoure, Sarr, Eze, Mateta. Oliver Glasner has made one change to his Crystal Palace side from their 1-1 draw with Newcastle on Saturday for tonight’s crucial game against Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Team News: One change for Palace at Ipswich
arts.sum: Cheick Doucouré returns to Crystal Palace’s starting XI to face Ipswich Town at Portman Road tonight.

arts.ttl: Live Blog: Ipswich Town v Crystal Palace
arts.sum: For the first time in over a decade, the Eagles are making the journey up to Portman Road. Follow along in our live blog below for all the latest updates from our trip to Suffolk...
